title: DearGiftHistoryRecord
description: Single record in ./gift-history.jsonl. Written once per delivered gift. Fields are used for repetition awareness and optional personal history.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for when this record was created.

slug.description: Stable short identifier for repetition tracking, e.g. 'mom', 'xiao-a', 'ren'. Should match the folder slug under ./gifts/.

name_or_nickname.description: The name or nickname the user uses for this person.

relationship.description: Relationship type, e.g. parent, partner, friend, colleague, kid, sibling, self.

trigger.description: Why the user invoked the skill.

content_direction.description: High-level content direction such as witness, extension, encouragement, portrait, comfort, gift-from-elsewhere, play, utility, curation, real-world-nudge, or delayed-payoff.

output_shape.description: Compact output-shape category used for repetition control.

visual_style.description: High-level visual-style category such as dark-terminal, dark-cinematic, light-warm, colorful-playful, minimal-poster, pixel-retro, photographic.

visual_elements.description: Dominant visual ingredients actually visible in the artifact, e.g. ['paper-texture', 'handwriting-blue', 'red-stamp'].

concept_theme.description: Short tag for the real-world domain the concept borrows from, e.g. 'airport', 'medical', 'music', 'cooking'.

emotional_intent.description: What the user wanted the recipient to feel, e.g. seen, comforted, amused, remembered.

artifact_path.description: Path to the generated artifact, relative to the working directory.

hosted_url.description: Public URL for hosted H5 gifts, if deployed.

summary.description: One-line summary of the gift's concept and anchor.
